violations.detail: Modal extends ComponentDelegate instead of BaseComponent or BaseComponentSVG
onClose() returns null instead of this on line 292
Public static final SUB_COMPONENT_ID/SUB_COMPONENT_NAME at lines 51-52 declared after private static final Logger at line 50; public static final should precede private static final
Package-private field 'severity' at line 55 declared between private final 'textElement' and private non-final 'failSafeIconElement'; package-private fields should come before private fields
Package-private field 'title' at line 53 declared after private static Logger and public static constants; package-private non-final should come before private fields
